Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evan Cote of Albertson & Davidson LLP telephone number 909-466-1711 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ALBERTSON & DAVIDSON LLP'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF DAVID SIMMONS is granted. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
